name: Jackie's Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen spinach (10 oz.) - defrost and drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch pie pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Sauté onion and garlic in margarine until translucent. Set aside.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine eggs, shredded Cheddar, bacon bits, onion mixture, milk, and seasonings until well blended.
5. Add spinach and blend again.
6. Roll biscuit dough between two layers of wax paper. Place in the pie pan, forming it with the sides.
7. Pour quiche batter into the crust.
8. Bake at 375°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
Serves 4
Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD"
